scripts.postinstall: git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
scripts.contributor:dev:anthropic: cd apps/example && env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -u OPENALEX_API_KEY -u OPENALEX_MAILTO -u SEARXNG_URL bun --env-file=../../.env.morning-contributor run start:anthropic
